'''Tuomis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] field researcher with the [[Obroan Institute for Archaeology|Obroan Institute]] who worked on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brath Qella|Maltha Obex]] and acquired shelter fever during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
